evidence_ledger_tiers: Tier 2: queue, format, rank, and event context
fixtures.tier_scope_notes: This first-pass fixture is not Tier 5 card-action coverage, Tier 6 drift baseline coverage, or Tier 7 analytics coverage.
fixtures.update_policy: Updates require issue #94 or a follow-up issue, this contract or an amended contract, Codex C handoff, Codex E review, and PR drift-budget disclosure.
known_limitations: Does not prove broad parser correctness.
Does not prove drift baseline policy.
Does not prove live workbook state.
Does not prove deployed Apps Script state.
